methods.description: This method involves the identification and comparison of PmF-box genes from 'Zaohong' using specific primers, and the analysis of their amino acid sequences to determine similarities and differences with other genes.

steps.description: PmF-box1 (GenBank accession number: JX141276) and PmF-box2 (GenBank accession number: JX141277) were identified from 'Zaohong' using SFB-C1F and Pm-Vb primers.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify PmF-box genes using specific primers

steps.description: BLAST searches in GenBank showed that the amino acid sequences of PmF-box genes have a high similarity to ParF-box2 (95.69 %).
steps.searchable_summary: Perform BLAST search for amino acid sequence similarity

steps.description: Analyze the structure of PmF-box genes to identify F-box motif, variable regions (V1 and V2), and hypervariable regions (HVa and HVb).
steps.searchable_summary: Identify structural motifs and regions in PmF-box genes

steps.description: Compare PmF-box genes with PmSFB genes to identify insertions and deletions in variable and hypervariable regions.
steps.searchable_summary: Compare PmF-box and PmSFB genes for structural differences
outputs: Insertions and deletions in V1, V2, HVa, HVb regions

steps.description: RT-PCRs for PmF-box genes were performed with cDNAs from pollen grains, leaves, and styles of 'Zaohong', using the specific primers PmF1 and PmF2.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform RT-PCR to analyze gene expression in different tissues
